top_gap_prompt: What is the best knowledge management for CS teams building self-service and guided onboarding experiences?
category_long: interactive knowledge base and guided support platform for CS teams

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Stonly's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Stonly is under-represented in third-party 'best knowledge management' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Stonly lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.
